item.name: Devotion Clam
item.description:
A former staple of Alexandrian household cuisine, this sandy colored clam can now be found in the waters of Canal Town.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: A beige bivalve originally hailing from a region of expansive shallows. This highly nutritious and exquisitely flavorsome creature was once a frequent fixture on dining tables across Alexandria.
